rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Powershell Obfuscated Commands (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Powershell Obfuscated Commands (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: df39fa21-d6b5-490e-85ef-d9b379707ac8
status: experimental
description: Detects powershell command line strings with high numbers of suspicious
  characters, potentially for obfuscation. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection
  Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/powershell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \powershell.exe
    CommandLine|re: ^([^^=%![(; ]*[\^=%![(; ]){8,}[^^=%![(; ]*$
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate processes with long or convoluted command lines.
level: low
